en.description_en: The site of Dainichiji temple classified as a monument (historic site). It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.

A bronze temple gong (waniguchi) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.
A pair of wrought-iron candlesticks classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.

en.description_en: A mizunara oak tree classified as a monument (natural monument). It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.
A collection of documents classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.
A Buddha's footprint stone classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.

en.description_en: Printing woodblocks for amulets and picture-charms of the former Dainichiji temple, with an accompanying ridge tablet, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.

A vermilion-seal charter (goshuinjō) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of historical materials. It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.

en.description_en: A memorial monument for three spirits connected to the Kan'ei-era Shiraiwa domain uprising, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of memorial monuments. It is town-designated in Nishikawa Town.
